requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (Peru NTP-IEC 60598 / IEC 62560)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（秘鲁 NTP-IEC 60598 / IEC 62560）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（秘魯 NTP-IEC 60598 / IEC 62560）

summary.en: LED luminaires and self-ballasted LED lamps sold in Peru are expected to meet the electrical-safety requirements of the relevant Peruvian Technical Standards (NTP), which adopt the IEC base standards: NTP-IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests) for luminaires, and IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V) for retrofit LED lamps. Standards are developed/published by INACAL (Instituto Nacional de Calidad), Peru's national quality body, which adopts IEC standards as NTP. Where a Reglamento Tecnico (technical regulation, issued via PRODUCE/INDECOPI) declares a product category in scope, conformity to the referenced safety standard becomes mandatory and is enforced at import through an in-country importer; otherwise the NTP applies on a voluntary/reference basis. Key safety content covers protection against electric shock (creepage/clearance, insulation resistance, touch current), thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and terminals. Products must be designed for the Peruvian grid of 220 V, 60 Hz.
summary.zh: 在秘鲁销售的 LED 灯具及自镇流 LED 灯应满足相关秘鲁技术标准（NTP）的电气安全要求，这些标准采用 IEC 基础标准：灯具适用 NTP-IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），改装型 LED 灯适用 IEC 62560（普通照明用 > 50 V 自镇流 LED 灯）。标准由秘鲁国家质量院（INACAL，国家质量主管机构）制定/发布，INACAL 将 IEC 标准采用为 NTP。当技术规范（Reglamento Tecnico，经 PRODUCE/INDECOPI 发布）宣布某产品类别纳入范围时，符合所引用安全标准即成为强制要求，并在进口环节通过当地进口商执行；否则 NTP 以自愿/参考方式适用。核心安全内容涵盖防触电（爬电距离/电气间隙、绝缘电阻、接触电流）、热耐久性、机械强度及端子。产品须按秘鲁电网 220 V、60 Hz 设计。
summary.zht: 在秘魯銷售的 LED 燈具及自鎮流 LED 燈應滿足相關秘魯技術標準（NTP）的電氣安全要求，這些標準採用 IEC 基礎標準：燈具適用 NTP-IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），改裝型 LED 燈適用 IEC 62560（普通照明用 > 50 V 自鎮流 LED 燈）。標準由秘魯國家質量院（INACAL，國家質量主管機構）制定/發布，INACAL 將 IEC 標準採用為 NTP。當技術規範（Reglamento Tecnico，經 PRODUCE/INDECOPI 發布）宣布某產品類別納入範圍時，符合所引用安全標準即成為強制要求，並在進口環節通過當地進口商執行；否則 NTP 以自願/參考方式適用。核心安全內容涵蓋防觸電（爬電距離/電氣間隙、絕緣電阻、接觸電流）、熱耐久性、機械強度及端子。產品須按秘魯電網 220 V、60 Hz 設計。

standards_or_laws: NTP-IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (INACAL adoption of IEC 60598-1)
IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications (adopted as NTP where applicable)
Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) where the product category is declared in scope

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB 7000.1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests; the GB 7000 series, derived from IEC 60598). Luminaires sold in the Chinese residential market generally require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) where in scope of CNCA rules, with testing by CNCA-authorized laboratories. For self-ballasted LED lamps, GB 24906 / related GB standards (derived from IEC 62560) apply. CCC certification and GB-standard test reports are issued under the Chinese conformity system and are not accepted as Peruvian conformity evidence, although the shared IEC technical base means much of the test content overlaps.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB 7000.1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验；GB 7000 系列，源自 IEC 60598）。在中国居民市场销售的灯具，凡属 CNCA 规则范围内，一般须取得中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 授权实验室检测。自镇流 LED 灯适用 GB 24906/相关 GB 标准（源自 IEC 62560）。CCC 认证及 GB 标准检测报告系在中国合格评定体系下出具，不被秘鲁接受为合格评定证据，但因共用 IEC 技术基础，大部分检测内容重叠。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB 7000.1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗；GB 7000 系列，源自 IEC 60598）。在中國居民市場銷售的燈具，凡屬 CNCA 規則範圍內，一般須取得中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 授權實驗室檢測。自鎮流 LED 燈適用 GB 24906/相關 GB 標準（源自 IEC 62560）。CCC 認證及 GB 標準檢測報告系在中國合格評定體系下出具，不被秘魯接受為合格評定證據，但因共用 IEC 技術基礎，大部分檢測內容重疊。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000.1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (SAC/SAMR; derived from IEC 60598-1)
GB 24906 / related GB standards — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting (derived from IEC 62560)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Peru and China both build on the IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 technical base, so the safety test content is largely shared. The practical gaps are: (1) China requires compulsory third-party CCC for in-scope residential luminaires, whereas Peru relies on NTP standards that become mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico declares the category in scope — exporters must first confirm whether their specific LED product category is under a Peruvian technical regulation; (2) Chinese CCC and GB test reports are not directly accepted as Peruvian conformity evidence — testing/certification should reference the NTP-IEC adoptions, although an IEC/CB-scheme test report can ease acceptance; (3) the Peruvian grid is 60 Hz vs China's 50 Hz (both ~220 V nominal), so any mains-frequency-dependent behaviour, control gear, and thermal ratings should be verified at 60 Hz; (4) conformity and import are handled through an in-country importer, with port clearance at Callao. There is no EU-style CE self-declaration framework — Peru's route is NTP conformity plus, where applicable, the Reglamento Tecnico.
gap.zh: 秘鲁与中国均以 IEC 60598/IEC 62560 技术基础为依据，安全检测内容基本共用。实际差距包括：（1）中国对范围内居民灯具要求强制性第三方 CCC，而秘鲁依据 NTP 标准，仅在技术规范（Reglamento Tecnico）宣布该类别纳入范围时才成为强制——出口商须先确认其具体 LED 产品类别是否受秘鲁技术规范管辖；（2）中国 CCC 及 GB 检测报告不被直接接受为秘鲁合格评定证据——检测/认证应引用 NTP-IEC 采用版本，但 IEC/CB 体系检测报告可便于接受；（3）秘鲁电网为 60 Hz，而中国为 50 Hz（标称均约 220 V），因此任何依赖工频的特性、控制装置及热额定值应在 60 Hz 下核验；（4）合格评定与进口通过当地进口商办理，在卡亚俄（Callao）港清关。秘鲁没有欧盟式 CE 自我声明框架——其路径为 NTP 合格评定，并在适用时叠加技术规范。
gap.zht: 秘魯與中國均以 IEC 60598/IEC 62560 技術基礎為依據，安全檢測內容基本共用。實際差距包括：（1）中國對範圍內居民燈具要求強制性第三方 CCC，而秘魯依據 NTP 標準，僅在技術規範（Reglamento Tecnico）宣布該類別納入範圍時才成為強制——出口商須先確認其具體 LED 產品類別是否受秘魯技術規範管轄；（2）中國 CCC 及 GB 檢測報告不被直接接受為秘魯合格評定證據——檢測/認證應引用 NTP-IEC 採用版本，但 IEC/CB 體系檢測報告可便於接受；（3）秘魯電網為 60 Hz，而中國為 50 Hz（標稱均約 220 V），因此任何依賴工頻的特性、控制裝置及熱額定值應在 60 Hz 下核驗；（4）合格評定與進口通過當地進口商辦理，在卡亞俄（Callao）港清關。秘魯沒有歐盟式 CE 自我聲明框架——其路徑為 NTP 合格評定，並在適用時疊加技術規範。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — NTP-IEC 60598-1 / IEC 62560 safety content applies; it becomes mandatory where a Peruvian Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) declares the LED product category in scope, otherwise it is a reference/voluntary NTP. Confirm the specific category.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where in CCC scope — CCC certification required for in-scope residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; GB 7000.1 / GB 24906 are the applicable safety standards

source.publisher: INACAL (Instituto Nacional de Calidad) — Gobierno del Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru's luminaire and LED-lamp electrical safety is governed by INACAL NTP standards adopting IEC 60598-1 and IEC 62560, becoming mandatory where a Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) declares the category in scope. The technical content overlaps heavily with China's GB 7000.1 / GB 24906 (shared IEC base), but Chinese CCC and GB reports are not accepted as Peruvian conformity evidence; an IEC/CB-scheme report eases acceptance. Verify the 60 Hz / 220 V grid behaviour and confirm whether the specific category falls under a Peruvian technical regulation before shipment via an in-country importer to Callao.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁的灯具及 LED 灯电气安全由 INACAL 采用 IEC 60598-1 及 IEC 62560 的 NTP 标准管辖，并在技术规范（PRODUCE/INDECOPI）宣布该类别纳入范围时成为强制要求。技术内容与中国 GB 7000.1/GB 24906 高度重叠（共用 IEC 基础），但中国 CCC 及 GB 报告不被接受为秘鲁合格评定证据；IEC/CB 体系报告可便于接受。出货前请核验 60 Hz/220 V 电网特性，并确认具体类别是否受秘鲁技术规范管辖，再经当地进口商运抵卡亚俄（Callao）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯的燈具及 LED 燈電氣安全由 INACAL 採用 IEC 60598-1 及 IEC 62560 的 NTP 標準管轄，並在技術規範（PRODUCE/INDECOPI）宣布該類別納入範圍時成為強制要求。技術內容與中國 GB 7000.1/GB 24906 高度重疊（共用 IEC 基礎），但中國 CCC 及 GB 報告不被接受為秘魯合格評定證據；IEC/CB 體系報告可便於接受。出貨前請核驗 60 Hz/220 V 電網特性，並確認具體類別是否受秘魯技術規範管轄，再經當地進口商運抵卡亞俄（Callao）。

requirement_topic.en: LED Driver / Control Gear Safety (Peru NTP-IEC 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: LED 驱动器 / 控制装置安全（秘鲁 NTP-IEC 61347-2-13）
requirement_topic.zht: LED 驅動器 / 控制裝置安全（秘魯 NTP-IEC 61347-2-13）

summary.en: LED drivers (control gear for LED modules) sold in Peru are expected to meet the safety content of the Peruvian NTP adoption of IEC 61347-2-13 (Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), published by INACAL. The standard specifies isolation class, dielectric strength, thermal endurance, and safety marking. Where the driver category is declared in scope by a Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI), conformity becomes mandatory at import; otherwise the NTP applies on a reference basis. A driver intended for the Peruvian grid must be rated for 220 V, 60 Hz input. If the driver is sold as a separate product (not integrated into the luminaire), its conformity evidence is assessed in its own right.
summary.zh: 在秘鲁销售的 LED 驱动器（LED 模块控制装置）应满足由 INACAL 发布、采用 IEC 61347-2-13（灯控装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求）的秘鲁 NTP 安全内容。该标准规定绝缘等级、介电强度、热耐久性及安全标志。当驱动器类别被技术规范（Reglamento Tecnico，PRODUCE/INDECOPI）宣布纳入范围时，进口环节符合性即成为强制要求；否则 NTP 以参考方式适用。面向秘鲁电网的驱动器须按 220 V、60 Hz 输入额定。若驱动器作为独立产品销售（未集成于灯具内），其合格评定证据将单独评估。
summary.zht: 在秘魯銷售的 LED 驅動器（LED 模組控制裝置）應滿足由 INACAL 發布、採用 IEC 61347-2-13（燈控裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求）的秘魯 NTP 安全內容。該標準規定絕緣等級、介電強度、熱耐久性及安全標誌。當驅動器類別被技術規範（Reglamento Tecnico，PRODUCE/INDECOPI）宣布納入範圍時，進口環節符合性即成為強制要求；否則 NTP 以參考方式適用。面向秘魯電網的驅動器須按 220 V、60 Hz 輸入額定。若驅動器作為獨立產品銷售（未集成於燈具內），其合格評定證據將單獨評估。

standards_or_laws: NTP-IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (INACAL adoption of IEC 61347-2-13)
Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) where the driver category is declared in scope

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 19510.14 (Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), technically aligned with IEC 61347-2-13. CCC certification may be required for LED drivers in certain power ranges sold in the Chinese residential market, with testing by CNCA-authorized laboratories. Chinese CCC test reports under GB 19510.14 are issued under the Chinese conformity system and are not accepted as Peruvian conformity evidence, although the shared IEC 61347-2-13 base means the test content overlaps substantially.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 19510.14（灯的控制装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求），技术上与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐。在中国居民市场，特定功率范围内的 LED 驱动器可能须取得 CCC 认证，由 CNCA 授权实验室检测。中国 GB 19510.14 下的 CCC 检测报告系在中国合格评定体系下出具，不被接受为秘鲁合格评定证据，但因共用 IEC 61347-2-13 基础，检测内容大量重叠。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 19510.14（燈的控制裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求），技術上與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊。在中國居民市場，特定功率範圍內的 LED 驅動器可能須取得 CCC 認證，由 CNCA 授權實驗室檢測。中國 GB 19510.14 下的 CCC 檢測報告系在中國合格評定體系下出具，不被接受為秘魯合格評定證據，但因共用 IEC 61347-2-13 基礎，檢測內容大量重疊。

standards_or_laws: GB 19510.14 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (SAC/SAMR; aligned with IEC 61347-2-13)

gap.en: Peru's NTP-IEC 61347-2-13 and China's GB 19510.14 both derive from IEC 61347-2-13, so technical content is largely harmonized. Key gaps: (1) Chinese CCC test reports are not accepted as Peruvian conformity evidence — an IEC/CB-scheme report against IEC 61347-2-13 generally eases acceptance in Peru; (2) the Peruvian grid is 60 Hz (China 50 Hz), both ~220 V nominal, so the driver must be rated and verified at 60 Hz input — drivers designed only for 50 Hz operation should be confirmed for 60 Hz suitability; (3) whether conformity is mandatory depends on whether the driver category is within a Peruvian Reglamento Tecnico — confirm scope; (4) a standalone driver's conformity evidence is assessed separately from the luminaire. There is no CE-style standalone DoC requirement in Peru — the route is NTP conformity plus, where applicable, the technical regulation enforced via the in-country importer.
gap.zh: 秘鲁 NTP-IEC 61347-2-13 与中国 GB 19510.14 均源自 IEC 61347-2-13，技术内容基本协调。主要差距：（1）中国 CCC 检测报告不被接受为秘鲁合格评定证据——依据 IEC 61347-2-13 的 IEC/CB 体系报告通常便于在秘鲁被接受；（2）秘鲁电网为 60 Hz（中国 50 Hz），标称均约 220 V，故驱动器须按 60 Hz 输入额定并核验——仅按 50 Hz 设计的驱动器应确认 60 Hz 适用性；（3）符合性是否强制取决于驱动器类别是否处于秘鲁技术规范范围内——须确认范围；（4）独立驱动器的合格评定证据与灯具分开评估。秘鲁没有 CE 式独立 DoC 要求——其路径为 NTP 合格评定，并在适用时叠加经当地进口商执行的技术规范。
gap.zht: 秘魯 NTP-IEC 61347-2-13 與中國 GB 19510.14 均源自 IEC 61347-2-13，技術內容基本協調。主要差距：（1）中國 CCC 檢測報告不被接受為秘魯合格評定證據——依據 IEC 61347-2-13 的 IEC/CB 體系報告通常便於在秘魯被接受；（2）秘魯電網為 60 Hz（中國 50 Hz），標稱均約 220 V，故驅動器須按 60 Hz 輸入額定並核驗——僅按 50 Hz 設計的驅動器應確認 60 Hz 適用性；（3）符合性是否強制取決於驅動器類別是否處於秘魯技術規範範圍內——須確認範圍；（4）獨立驅動器的合格評定證據與燈具分開評估。秘魯沒有 CE 式獨立 DoC 要求——其路徑為 NTP 合格評定，並在適用時疊加經當地進口商執行的技術規範。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — NTP-IEC 61347-2-13 safety content applies; mandatory where a Peruvian Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) declares the driver category in scope, otherwise reference/voluntary. Driver must be rated for 220 V, 60 Hz.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (power-range dependent) — CCC may be required for LED drivers in certain ranges under CNCA-C10-01; GB 19510.14 is the applicable safety standard

source.publisher: INACAL (Instituto Nacional de Calidad) — Gobierno del Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED drivers for Peru should meet the NTP-IEC 61347-2-13 safety content, becoming mandatory where a Reglamento Tecnico declares the category in scope. The standard shares the IEC 61347-2-13 base with China's GB 19510.14, but Chinese CCC reports are not accepted as Peruvian evidence; an IEC/CB-scheme report eases acceptance. The driver must be rated and verified for the Peruvian 220 V, 60 Hz grid (vs China's 50 Hz). A standalone driver's conformity is assessed separately; confirm whether the specific driver category falls under a Peruvian technical regulation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向秘鲁的 LED 驱动器应满足 NTP-IEC 61347-2-13 安全内容，并在技术规范宣布该类别纳入范围时成为强制要求。该标准与中国 GB 19510.14 共用 IEC 61347-2-13 基础，但中国 CCC 报告不被接受为秘鲁证据；IEC/CB 体系报告可便于接受。驱动器须按秘鲁 220 V、60 Hz 电网（区别于中国 50 Hz）额定并核验。独立驱动器的合格评定单独评估；请确认具体驱动器类别是否受秘鲁技术规范管辖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向秘魯的 LED 驅動器應滿足 NTP-IEC 61347-2-13 安全內容，並在技術規範宣布該類別納入範圍時成為強制要求。該標準與中國 GB 19510.14 共用 IEC 61347-2-13 基礎，但中國 CCC 報告不被接受為秘魯證據；IEC/CB 體系報告可便於接受。驅動器須按秘魯 220 V、60 Hz 電網（區別於中國 50 Hz）額定並核驗。獨立驅動器的合格評定單獨評估；請確認具體驅動器類別是否受秘魯技術規範管轄。
